name: PikaSim
description: eSIM data plans for 190+ countries with hotspot support. MCP endpoint and OpenAPI spec. Lightning and on-chain BTC payments via self-hosted BTCPay Server. Reseller API enables full programmatic purchase after wallet setup.

agent_endpoints.auth_note: Public AI API (catalog browsing, no auth). Purchase requires Reseller API: create a reseller wallet at pikasim.com/reseller, fund with BTC/LN/XMR, generate API key from dashboard.
